prometheus-rules.yaml.title: Autoscaling ceiling delayed recovery under burst traffic.
prometheus-rules.yaml.evidence: HPA hit maxReplicas=12 for 11 minutes while p95 latency stayed above 900ms.

prometheus-rules.yaml.title: Readiness probes allowed stale Redis connections.
prometheus-rules.yaml.evidence: 23% of restarted pods returned 5xx for the first two minutes after start.

prometheus-rules.yaml.title: Cache failover chaos coverage was missing.
prometheus-rules.yaml.evidence: No recorded game-day validating cache failover in the last 90 days.
